description: AI Safety Officer — cross-references FOQA, safety reports, maintenance data, and training records to identify systemic risks. Purely advisory — all safety decisions require human approval.

soft_flags.label: Cross-Source Pattern Detected
soft_flags.logic: Correlated events detected across multiple safety data sources — may indicate systemic risk not visible in any single data stream

soft_flags.label: Systemic Risk Identified
soft_flags.logic: Analysis identifies a systemic risk factor spanning multiple operational areas

soft_flags.label: Training Gap Correlated with Events
soft_flags.logic: Safety events or FOQA exceedances correlate with training currency gaps for specific crew members or fleet-wide

soft_flags.label: Fleet-Wide Trend Emerging
soft_flags.logic: Analysis detects an emerging trend affecting the fleet broadly rather than isolated to specific aircraft, routes, or crew
